overall.description: A first-person perspective scene from a cyberpunk video game showing a character with pink hair and yellow pants smoking against a vibrant teal graffiti wall. Another character with purple hair walks past the camera on a sunlit urban sidewalk beneath a concrete overpass. The scene features high-quality game graphics with vivid neon-colored graffiti and futuristic fashion.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a sunlit urban sidewalk beneath a concrete overpass. A character with pink hair leans against a vibrant teal wall covered in colorful graffiti, smoking. In the background, a second character with purple hair approaches from the left, walking toward the camera.

segments.scene_description: The purple-haired character walks past the camera at close range, temporarily obscuring the view. The perspective shifts as the character passes, causing the background graffiti wall to move to the left side of the frame before the camera refocuses.

segments.scene_description: After the pedestrian passes, the camera returns to focusing on the pink-haired character who remains stationary against the graffiti wall. The character exhales smoke and looks around the environment while the camera maintains a steady observation of the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective on a sunlit urban sidewalk that shifts from a wide observation of a street scene to a focused study of a single character. It begins beneath a concrete overpass where a pink-haired character leans against a vibrant teal graffiti wall while smoking, as a second character with purple hair approaches from the left. As the purple-haired pedestrian walks past at close range, they temporarily obscure the view, causing the background graffiti to shift across the frame. The scene then opens back up as the pedestrian clears the field of vision, allowing the camera to refocus on the stationary figure. Finally, the perspective settles on the pink-haired character as they exhale smoke and look around the environment.
